===== moon.pkg =====
import {
  "example/demo/model",
  "KKKIIO/selene/app",
  "KKKIIO/selene/ecs",
  "KKKIIO/selene/entity",
  "KKKIIO/selene/event",
  "KKKIIO/selene/system",
  "KKKIIO/selene_xaml_runtime/component_host",
  "KKKIIO/selene_xaml_runtime/ui_host",
  "moonbitlang/core/string",
}

supported_targets = "native+js"

===== state.generated.mbt =====
// Generated by selene-xaml@0.1.0. DO NOT EDIT.
// lock-format: 1
// input user fixtures/demo.xaml sha256=6581541beadaf3304311f7772b85eb02122dfc21b53477fdb8a5962a5da9fef6
// input moon-info fixtures/model.mbti sha256=2d104c1cc7aa618b087ebd34252aa62aa9186af91ae45a45eb91f9eb0bbdfaa0

///|
pub type DemoState = @model.DemoState

===== view.generated.mbt =====
// Generated by selene-xaml@0.1.0. DO NOT EDIT.
// lock-format: 1
// input user fixtures/demo.xaml sha256=6581541beadaf3304311f7772b85eb02122dfc21b53477fdb8a5962a5da9fef6
// input moon-info fixtures/model.mbti sha256=2d104c1cc7aa618b087ebd34252aa62aa9186af91ae45a45eb91f9eb0bbdfaa0

///|
pub(all) enum DemoViewAction {} derive(Eq, Debug)

///|
pub(all) suberror DemoViewError {
  AlreadyMounted
  NotMounted
  DeadEntity
  DuplicateKey(String, String)
  InvalidPatch(String)
  Host(@ui_host.HostError)
} derive(Eq, Debug)

///|
pub impl Show for DemoViewError with fn output(self, logger) {
  match self {
    AlreadyMounted =>
      logger.write_string("view is already mounted on this entity")
    NotMounted => logger.write_string("view is not mounted on this entity")
    DeadEntity => logger.write_string("view entity is not alive")
    DuplicateKey(path, key) =>
      logger.write_string("duplicate or empty key in " + path + ": " + key)
    InvalidPatch(message) => logger.write_string(message)
    Host(error) => logger.write_string(error.to_string())
  }
}

///|
fn generated_compute_view_model(model : DemoState) -> DemoState {
  model
}

///|
#warnings("-unused_value")
fn generated_rect_component(
  value : String,
  index : Int,
  path : String,
) -> Double raise DemoViewError {
  let parts = value.split(" ").filter(part => part != "").collect()
  let selected = match parts.length() {
    1 => parts[0]
    2 => if index == 0 || index == 2 { parts[1] } else { parts[0] }
    4 =>
      match index {
        0 => parts[3]
        1 => parts[0]
        2 => parts[1]
        _ => parts[2]
      }
    _ => raise InvalidPatch("invalid rect value for " + path + ": " + value)
  }
  @string.parse_double(selected) catch {
    _ =>
      raise InvalidPatch(
        "invalid number for " + path + ": " + selected.to_owned(),
      )
  }
}

///|
fn generated_contains(specs : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec], key : String) -> Bool {
  for spec in specs {
    if spec.key == key {
      return true
    }
  }
  false
}

///|
fn generated_parent_index(
  specs : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec],
  parent : String?,
  key : String,
) -> Int {
  let mut sibling_index = 0
  for spec in specs {
    if spec.parent == parent {
      if spec.key == key {
        return sibling_index
      }
      sibling_index += 1
    }
  }
  -1
}

///|
fn generated_diff(
  previous : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec],
  desired : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec],
) -> Array[@ui_host.TreeMutation] {
  if previous == desired {
    return []
  }
  let previous_by_key : Map[String, @ui_host.NodeSpec] = Map([])
  let desired_by_key : Map[String, @ui_host.NodeSpec] = Map([])
  for spec in previous {
    previous_by_key[spec.key] = spec
  }
  for spec in desired {
    desired_by_key[spec.key] = spec
  }
  let mutations : Array[@ui_host.TreeMutation] = []
  for spec in previous {
    if !desired_by_key.contains(spec.key) {
      let removed_root = match spec.parent {
        Some(parent) => desired_by_key.contains(parent)
        None => true
      }
      if removed_root {
        mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::Remove(spec.key))
      }
    }
  }
  for spec in desired {
    match previous_by_key.get(spec.key) {
      None => {
        mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::Mount(spec))
        match spec.parent {
          Some(parent) =>
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::Move(
                spec.key,
                parent,
                generated_parent_index(desired, spec.parent, spec.key),
              ),
            )
          None => ()
        }
      }
      Some(old) => {
        let moved = old.parent != spec.parent ||
          generated_parent_index(previous, old.parent, old.key) !=
          generated_parent_index(desired, spec.parent, spec.key)
        match spec.parent {
          Some(parent) if moved =>
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::Move(
                spec.key,
                parent,
                generated_parent_index(desired, spec.parent, spec.key),
              ),
            )
          _ => ()
        }
        let precise_old = {
          ..old,
          parent: spec.parent,
          text: spec.text,
          source: spec.source,
          active: spec.active,
          enabled: spec.enabled,
          style: {
            ..old.style,
            background: spec.style.background,
            top: spec.style.top,
          },
        }
        if precise_old != spec {
          mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::Update(spec))
        } else {
          if old.text != spec.text {
            mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::SetText(spec.key, spec.text))
          }
          if old.source != spec.source {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetSource(spec.key, spec.source),
            )
          }
          if old.style.background != spec.style.background {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetBackground(
                spec.key,
                spec.style.background,
              ),
            )
          }
          if old.active != spec.active {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetActive(spec.key, spec.active),
            )
          }
          if old.enabled != spec.enabled {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetEnabled(spec.key, spec.enabled),
            )
          }
          if old.style.top != spec.style.top {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetTop(spec.key, spec.style.top),
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  mutations
}

///|
#warnings("-struct_never_constructed")
pub struct DemoView {}

///|
priv struct GeneratedViewRecord {
  mut model : DemoState
  mut view_model : DemoState
  mut specs : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec]
}

///|
let generated_view_records : Map[@entity.Entity, GeneratedViewRecord] = Map([])

///|
pub(all) struct DemoViewActionEvent {
  entity : @entity.Entity
  action : DemoViewAction
}

///|
pub let action_event_bus : @event.Events[DemoViewActionEvent] = @event.Events()

///|
let generated_event_reader : @event.EventReader[
  @component_host.UiComponentEvent,
] = @event.EventReader()

///|
fn generated_specs(
  state : DemoState,
) -> Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec] raise DemoViewError {
  let nodes : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec] = []
  nodes.push({
    key: "root",
    parent: None,
    kind: @ui_host.NodeKind::View,
    text: "",
    source: "",
    active: true,
    enabled: true,
    focusable: false,
    style: {
      absolute: false,
      left: 0.0,
      top: 0.0,
      width: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      height: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      margin_left: 0.0,
      margin_top: 0.0,
      margin_right: 0.0,
      margin_bottom: 0.0,
      padding_left: 0.0,
      padding_top: 0.0,
      padding_right: 0.0,
      padding_bottom: 0.0,
      background: "",
      border_color: "",
      border: 0.0,
      radius: 0.0,
      outline_color: "",
      outline_width: 0.0,
      outline_offset: 0.0,
      color: "",
      font_family: "",
      font_size: 0.0,
      bold: false,
      align: @ui_host.TextAlign::Left,
      wrap: false,
      z_index: 0,
      fit: @ui_host.ImageFit::Fill,
      direction: @ui_host.FlexDirection::Column,
      flex_basis: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      flex_grow: 0.0,
      flex_shrink: 1.0,
      row_gap: 0.0,
      column_gap: 0.0,
      horizontal_scroll: false,
      vertical_scroll: false,
      scrollbar_width: 0.0,
    },
    visual_state_groups: [],
  })
  nodes.push({
    key: "node-root-0-text",
    parent: Some("root"),
    kind: @ui_host.NodeKind::Text,
    text: state.title,
    source: "",
    active: true,
    enabled: true,
    focusable: false,
    style: {
      absolute: false,
      left: 0.0,
      top: 0.0,
      width: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      height: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      margin_left: 0.0,
      margin_top: 0.0,
      margin_right: 0.0,
      margin_bottom: 0.0,
      padding_left: 0.0,
      padding_top: 0.0,
      padding_right: 0.0,
      padding_bottom: 0.0,
      background: "",
      border_color: "",
      border: 0.0,
      radius: 0.0,
      outline_color: "",
      outline_width: 0.0,
      outline_offset: 0.0,
      color: "",
      font_family: "",
      font_size: 0.0,
      bold: false,
      align: @ui_host.TextAlign::Left,
      wrap: false,
      z_index: 0,
      fit: @ui_host.ImageFit::Fill,
      direction: @ui_host.FlexDirection::Column,
      flex_basis: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      flex_grow: 0.0,
      flex_shrink: 1.0,
      row_gap: 0.0,
      column_gap: 0.0,
      horizontal_scroll: false,
      vertical_scroll: false,
      scrollbar_width: 0.0,
    },
    visual_state_groups: [],
  })
  nodes
}

///|
pub fn DemoView::mount(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  model : DemoState,
) -> Unit raise DemoViewError {
  if !entity.is_alive() {
    raise DeadEntity
  }
  if generated_view_records.contains(entity) {
    raise AlreadyMounted
  }
  let view_model = generated_compute_view_model(model)
  let desired = generated_specs(view_model)
  let host = @component_host.SeleneHost::new()
  host.mount(entity, desired) catch {
    error => raise Host(error)
  }
  generated_view_records[entity] = { model, view_model, specs: desired }
}

///|
pub fn DemoView::replace(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  model : DemoState,
) -> Unit raise DemoViewError {
  let record = match generated_view_records.get(entity) {
    Some(value) => value
    None => raise NotMounted
  }
  if !entity.is_alive() {
    generated_view_records.remove(entity)
    raise DeadEntity
  }
  let view_model = generated_compute_view_model(model)
  let desired = generated_specs(view_model)
  let mutations = generated_diff(record.specs, desired)
  if mutations.length() > 0 {
    let host = @component_host.SeleneHost::new()
    host.apply(entity, mutations) catch {
      error => raise Host(error)
    }
  }
  record.model = model
  record.view_model = view_model
  record.specs = desired
}

///|
fn generated_handle_event(
  record : GeneratedViewRecord,
  event : @ui_host.UiEvent,
) -> DemoViewAction? {
  if !generated_contains(record.specs, event.key) {
    return None
  }
  None
}

///|
fn generated_route_events(_world : @ecs.World) -> Unit {
  let dead : Array[@entity.Entity] = []
  for entity, _ in generated_view_records {
    if !entity.is_alive() {
      dead.push(entity)
    }
  }
  for entity in dead {
    generated_view_records.remove(entity)
  }
  for raw in generated_event_reader.read(@component_host.component_event_bus) {
    match generated_view_records.get(raw.entity) {
      Some(record) =>
        match generated_handle_event(record, raw.event) {
          Some(action) => action_event_bus.send({ entity: raw.entity, action })
          None => ()
        }
      None => ()
    }
  }
}

///|
pub fn plugin(app : @app.App) -> @app.App {
  app
  .add_plugin(@component_host.plugin)
  .add_message(action_event_bus)
  .add_system(
    @system.PostUpdate,
    generated_route_events,
    system_name="selene_xaml_DemoView_events",
  )
}

===== view.generated.mbt.map.json =====
{
  "mappings": [
    {
      "source": "fixtures/demo.xaml",
      "original_offset": 212,
      "generated_offset": 7693,
      "length": 11
    }
  ]
}

===== selene-xaml.lock.json =====
{
  "format_version": 1,
  "generator": "selene-xaml@0.1.0",
  "runtime": "KKKIIO/selene",
  "inputs": [
    { "owner": "user", "path": "fixtures/demo.xaml", "sha256": "6581541beadaf3304311f7772b85eb02122dfc21b53477fdb8a5962a5da9fef6" },
    { "owner": "moon-info", "path": "fixtures/model.mbti", "sha256": "2d104c1cc7aa618b087ebd34252aa62aa9186af91ae45a45eb91f9eb0bbdfaa0" }
  ],
  "resolved_contract": { "kind": "mbti", "path": "fixtures/model.mbti", "package": "example/demo/model", "sha256": "2d104c1cc7aa618b087ebd34252aa62aa9186af91ae45a45eb91f9eb0bbdfaa0" },
  "requested_outputs": ["moon.pkg", "state.generated.mbt", "view.generated.mbt", "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "selene-xaml.lock.json"],
  "output_naming": { "package_directory": ".", "state": "state.generated.mbt", "view": "view.generated.mbt", "source_map": "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "lock": "selene-xaml.lock.json" },
  "package_alias": { "alias": "model", "package": "example/demo/model" },
  "imported_sidecars": [],
  "host_capability": { "package": "KKKIIO/selene_xaml_runtime/ui_host", "contract": "component-host", "version": "0.1.0", "operations": ["mount", "apply"] },
  "abi_fingerprint": "sha256:1ae44b27bc9a2cdcc9cf344c96ea16e1f015f38f0ec59570650d99d21791efe9",
  "outputs": [    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "moon.pkg", "sha256": "69c7bb0bc761d67b9fd23bb5d39b433576cdef8e0f06fe3faed96247cf73d75e" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "state.generated.mbt", "sha256": "3c9ff55c322e0f9d5338ed7bc5ffad07c11d040726f1239335f616736430ebaf" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "view.generated.mbt", "sha256": "9b758158e0cf5ebb1de3e1c9f37bc1c237f774cd767ecc4448d045813907e6ed" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "sha256": "3473e6ddcae0bb9ddfa6123d1c6ef4bbd3307e5a71ba109553a40944a49c2149" }
  ],
  "lock_path": "selene-xaml.lock.json"
}
